text:
もうよ、こんなやべー相談
おたくが相手じゃなきゃ、できねーよ。

マジでとんでもねーことになりそうで
話す相手を慎重に選んでるワケよ。

だが、やべーことには慣れっこでも
今回ばかりはマジ気をつけてくれよな！

このオレがこんだけビビってんだから
おたくもぜって

Hey, listen pal, I'm not sure I could talk this
up with anyone but you.

This is some real serious
business here, my friend.
I can't just go taking this up with anyone.

And I know you're used to doing some crazy
stuff, but really, you gotta be careful this
time around!

I mean look, even I'm a little
scared of this one, so I'm sure you're
probably trembling already!
